creator: fredmfp@gmail.com
text:
my kernel conf looks like this:
# USB support
device          uhci                    # UHCI PCI->USB interface
device          ohci                    # OHCI PCI->USB interface
device          ehci                    # EHCI PCI->USB interface (USB 2.0)
device          usb                     # USB Bus (required)
device          ugen                    # Generic
#device         ulpt                    # Printer (don't enable it with hplip)
device          umass                   # Disks/Mass storage - Requires scbus and da

I have build the following ports:
cups-base-1.2.7_2, 
foomatic-db-20061214, foomatic-db-engine-20061214,
foomatic-db-hpijs-1.4, foomatic-filters-3.0.2_4
hplip-1.6.7

my HP 1320 is well recognized at boot time:
ugen1: Hewlett-Packard hp LaserJet 1320 series, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 3

but when I want to set up it with GUI (mozilla),
I can't get any HP printer in the Printer menu.

However, this printer works fine on my etch linuxbox, 
with cups 1.2.7.

Fix: 

dunno :-(
How-To-Repeat: Does not work with RELENG_6_1 & RELENG_6_2.
(does not work with GENERIC, because of ulpt device).
